title: AgentCYA config
description: Schema for ~/.agent-cya/config.json. Add "$schema": "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/agent-cya/config.schema.json" at the top of your config to get editor autocomplete and validation. Optionally override the reviewer per harness via the 'harnesses' block.

$schema.description: Pointer to this schema for editor tooling.

reviewers.description: Per-reviewer settings keyed by reviewer name. Currently only `openai` is configurable here; the `claude` and `opencode` reviewers pick up the local CLI's existing auth.

openai.description: Configuration for `--reviewer openai`. Talks to any OpenAI-compatible chat/completions endpoint over HTTP.

baseUrl.description: OpenAI-compatible API base URL. Example: https://api.openai.com/v1 — for local servers, http://127.0.0.1:11434/v1 (Ollama) or http://127.0.0.1:8000/v1.

model.description: Model identifier the server recognizes. Example: gpt-4o-mini, qwen2.5-coder:7b.

apiKey.description: Bearer token literal. For local servers that don't authenticate, use any non-empty placeholder (e.g. "unused").

apiKeyCmd.description: Shell command whose trimmed stdout is the bearer token. Takes precedence over apiKey when both are set. Example: "op read op://Personal/openai/credential".

harnesses.description: Per-harness reviewer overrides. Each harness (e.g. opencode, claudeCode) can specify which reviewer to use, overriding the harness's built-in default. Falls back to the built-in default when absent.

harnessOverride.description: Per-harness reviewer override. The 'reviewer' field, if set, overrides the harness's built-in default (claude for Claude Code hook, opencode for OpenCode plugin).

reviewer.description: Which reviewer this harness should use. Overrides the harness's built-in default. The --reviewer CLI flag, when passed, still wins over this.
